_comment: Canon config for calibration.mjs (Agent #2) ‚Äî committable, tunable, NOT PII. targets = the accuracy each gut-word SHOULD map to (knew‚âà0.95, shaky‚âà0.65, guessed‚âà0.30); ECE measures how far actual accuracy drifts from these. window_size/min_reps/trend_delta/danger are the reliability + danger-zone knobs.
